title: arnica lessingii subsp. genuina
intro: Arnica lessingii subsp. genuina, also known as the mountain arnica, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family, native to the high-altitude mountain ranges of the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Arnica lessingii subsp. genuina include its ability to reduce swelling, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Arnica lessingii subsp. genuina include topical creams, ointments, and gels, as well as teas and tinctures that can be used internally to promote overall health and well-being.
